---
applyTo: "RookRun.Web/**/*.razor,RookRun.Web/**/*.razor.cs,RookRun.Web/**/*.razor.css"
---

# Web UI Guidance

- Keep route pages readable by extracting substantial UI sections into child components.
- Keep component responsibilities focused and testable.
- Prefer matching namespaces and folder structure for page/component grouping.
- Add or update UI tests in `RookRun.Web.UnitTest` for behavior changes.

See:

- `docs/ai/coding-conventions.md`
- `docs/ai/feature-workflow.md`
- `docs/ai/project-map.md`
